changes.description: Master corridor architecture. ONE corridor (BlueEdge, run01, sandbox-multi-001, 3 overlays). 7-phase lifecycle. 10 runtime invariants. Corridor topology and boundaries.
Session runtime state (SBX-BE-001-003). Session lifecycle. 7 namespace isolation rules. Overlay chain binding (3 overlays, 7/17 backed). 8 fail-closed rules.
7 corridor workflow states (WS-01–WS-07). Complete transition map with zone overrides. Per-transition implementation and events.
Zone computation from 8 metrics. Zone transition rules (SAFE→PRESSURE→RISK→PROHIBITED). Operation matrix. PROHIBITED zone response. Mid-operation transitions.
Replay chain (7 states from upstream, 7/7 MATCH). Rollback chain with dependency analysis. Combined certification progression. Evidence chain. Certification-to-authority bridge.
4 authority boundaries with crossing protocols. Per-render anti-leakage verification (6 checks). Authority composition (baseline 45 fields, overlay 12 provisional).
9 observability dimensions. 28 corridor event types (RE-01–RE-28). Corridor health from 4 dimensions. Dashboard. Snapshot persistence. 9 alerts across 4 priorities.
7 lineage types (CL-01–CL-07). Hash-verified lineage nodes. 7 navigation primitives. Integrity verification. Reconstruction from evidence. Corridor-scoped lineage.
5 G-levels. 8 escalation triggers (ET-01–ET-08). Response protocols per G-level. Escalation lifecycle. Resolution protocol. Zone-escalation cross-impact.
9-point path boundary compliance (NOT PATH A/B/LENS). 10 execution safety rules. 10 runtime invariant verification. 9 upstream reference integrity. Governance confirmation.
Pre-flight, 9 upstream references, 16 execution steps, 10 design questions answered, 13 artifacts, governance confirmation.
